extDesc.message: Auto-open URLs in matching Firefox containers based on domain / path / regex rules.

headerHint.message: Rules are matched top-down; the first match wins. The Pattern field accepts multiple lines — any one matching counts as a match for that row. Container names refer to Firefox containers; missing ones are created on first use.

globalEnabledHint.message: When off, no rule and no default container apply — effectively pauses the extension.

defaultContainerHint.message: Used when no rule matches and the tab has no explicit container; will not override a tab's manual container choice.

empty.message: No rules yet — click the button below to add one.

importInvalid.message: Import failed: not a valid Container Switcher config

importConfirm.message: Import will overwrite all rules, default container and toggle state. Continue?

exampleDomainDesc.message: All Atlassian Cloud apps (Jira / Confluence / etc.) on the same account

examplePathDesc.message: Every repo under a single GitHub organization — useful for routing work code into a Work container

exampleRegexDesc.message: Local dev URLs on any port (http/https, port optional)

matcherEmptyPattern.message: At least one pattern is required
